description_en: Dublin may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 75 halal restaurants and 6 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Dublin, Ireland, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Dublin: 102 halal restaurants listed, 6 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
